>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/user/forgotPassword"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Generates a forgot password token and sends it via email

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"emailId":{"type":"string"},"hashPassword":{"type":"string"},"password":{"type":"string"},"token":{"type":"string"},"userId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"username":{"type":"string"}},"title":"EmailUser"}}},"description":"The email id to forgot password","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"Returns a success code if the operation was successful"},"403":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"User is disabled"},"500":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"Internal error while generating the forgot password token"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
